ambiguities.input_contextualized_conventional_defaul: Short-term payment plans (3 months or less) resolve at face value within normal credit terms — the $52,800 is recorded as a payable.
ambiguities.input_contextualized_ifrs_default: IFRS allows short-term payables to be recorded at face value when within normal credit terms.

ambiguities.input_contextualized_conventional_defaul: Text explicitly states '10% non-recoverable sales tax' — tax is capitalized into the asset cost, not recorded as a separate recoverable asset.
ambiguities.input_contextualized_ifrs_default: IAS 16.16(a) includes non-recoverable taxes in the cost of PP&E.
